packageRules.description: GitHub Actions on hyperi-ci are pinned by scripts/update-versions.py (the /deps SSOT in config/versions.yaml): SHA-pinned, 7-day cooldown, enforced at commit time by the pre-commit hook. Renovate stays a PASSIVE WATCHDOG here — it still detects action updates and lists them on the Dependency Dashboard (an independent second opinion), but raises no PR unless a human ticks the box, so it never fights the script's pins. Everything else (cargo/pip/npm) follows the org preset.
